title: austrobuxus ellipticus
intro: Austrobuxus ellipticus, also known as the Australian box, is a small, woody tree or shrub native to the tropical rainforests of northern Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Austrobuxus ellipticus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and itching, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, Austrobuxus ellipticus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
